## What this does

## Checklist

- [ ] Mirrors the nearest existing prior art (package, emitter, test) rather than inventing a new shape.
- [ ] All five gates pass locally: `npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test && npm run conformance && npm run selfcheck`.
- [ ] A new package, emitter, or invariant ships with a conformance or unit test that enforces it.
- [ ] Every commit is signed off (`git commit -s`) per the DCO in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
